  sl  local_address                         rem_address                          st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000000000000000000001000000:ABCD 00000000000000000000000001000000:4E51 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 1000 0 1234 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
